mapper.select: SELECT i.io_type, i.io_num, i.io_qty, ii.name, l.lot_num, ii.type, f.facility_name, TO_CHAR(i.io_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS io_date, i.io_reason FROM io i JOIN lot l ON l.lot_num = i.lot_num JOIN item ii ON ii.item_num = l.item_num JOIN facility f ON i.facility_num = f.facility_num ORDER BY i.io_num DESC

SELECT i.io_type, i.io_num, ii.name, l.lot_num, ii.type, f.facility_name, TO_CHAR(i.io_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS io_date, i.io_reason FROM io i JOIN lot l ON l.lot_num = i.lot_num JOIN item ii ON ii.item_num = l.item_num JOIN facility f ON i.facility_num = f.facility_num
AND upper(ii.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(ii.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND upper(ii.type) = 'EQUIP'
AND upper(ii.type) IN ('RAW', 'MATERIAL')
AND ( upper(ii.name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' OR upper(l.lot_num) LIKE '%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND i.io_type = '입고'
AND i.io_type = '출고'
AND i.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND i.io_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND i.io_date < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY i.io_num DESC

SELECT i.CODE, i.NAME, i.TYPE, i.UNIT, i.iTEM_NUM FROM item i LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM ITEM MINUS SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM BOM ) num ON i.item_num = num.item_num WHERE( UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%' OR UPPER(i.CODE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%') AND num.ITEM_NUM IS NOT NULL AND i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT')

SELECT p.NAME, b.BOM_NUM, b.REQUIRED_QTY, b.BOM_CODE,p.ITEM_NUM, b.BOM_STATUS, b.CREATED_AT, b.CHILD_QTY, p.TYPE, p.UNIT, i.NAME AS CNAME, i.CODE AS CCODE, i.UNIT AS CUNIT FROM BOM b JOIN ITEM p ON b.ITEM_NUM = p.ITEM_NUM JOIN ITEM i ON b.ITEM_NUM2 = i.ITEM_NUM WHERE b.BOM_NUM = #{bom_num} ORDER BY b.BOM_NUM ASC
SELECT ITEM_NUM, NAME, CODE, TYPE FROM item WHERE UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' AND TYPE != 'PRODUCT'
mapper.insert:
SELECT lot_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO lot ( lot_num, lot_code, expiry_date, item_num, lot_date, init_qty, current_qty, order_num ) VALUES ( #{lot_num}, 'LOT' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 36), #{item_num}, SYSDATE, #{io_qty}, #{io_qty}, NULL )

INSERT INTO io ( io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked ) VALUES ( io_seq.NEXTVAL, #{io_type}, #{io_qty}, #{io_date}, ( SELECT MIN(qc_num) FROM qc WHERE qc_type = (SELECT type FROM item WHERE item_num = #{item_num}) AND qc_pass = 'WAITING' ), #{lot_num}, #{io_reason}, 3, NULL, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT l.lot_num, i.item_num, l.current_qty, l.expiry_date, i.name, l.current_qty FROM lot l JOIN ITEM i ON I.ITEM_NUM = L.ITEM_NUM WHERE l.current_qty > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IO(io_num, io_type, io_qty, io_date, qc_num, lot_num, io_reason, facility_num, emp_num, qc_chked) VALUES(io_seq.nextval, '출고',#{io_qty} , #{io_date}, null, #{lot_num}, #{io_reason}, #{facility_num}, #{emp_num}, 'Y')
